answer:
To find the exchange rate from Mexican pesos (MXN) to US dollars (USD) in 2007, divide the USD amount by the MXN amount for the transactions in that year:

\[
\text{Exchange rate} = \frac{8.1 \text{ billion MXN}}{736.0 \text{ million USD}} = \frac{8,100,000,000}{736,000,000} \approx 11.005 \text{ MXN/USD}
\]

Rounding to two decimal places, the exchange rate in 2007 was approximately **\boxed{11.01}** MXN per USD.
